# Etra: Names & Cultures — hipparian culture overrides
# Generated by generate_mod.py from config.yaml
# Each culture is reassigned to its own dialect for regional name variants.

# === HIPPARIAN CULTURES ===

	language = hipparian_language
	color = map_poland

	culture_groups = {
		human_group
		great_swardish_group
	}
}
